description: Recto, right side: Account of expenditures in Dammuh (ca. 1182-3) by Sayyid al-Ahl, consisting of a list of disbursements made at the plantation in Dammuh in the course of a year. Most of the items pertain to building operations, including labor and materials, such as fence, mud and lime and stones for the well. Eight dirhams are mentioned as expenditure for the supply of palm branches. The total yearly amount of the expenditures was 628 dirhams, and since probably wariq dirhams are meant, this would represent ca. 15.5 dinars. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 324 #78) EMS
tags: communal, account, Dammuh, 12th c, qodesh, waqf
description_he: חשבון הוצאות אחוזת דמוה, כ-1182–1183, בידי סייד אל-אהל. כולל עבודות בנייה, גדר, בוץ, סיד ואבן לבאר. סה"כ 628 דרהם לשנה.
